claim: Day-ahead prices, actual generation per production type, actual load, physical cross-border flows, and installed generation capacity for DE-LU/FR/ES/PT/IT
source: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform REST API (via entsoe-py 0.8.0)
note: Primary TSO-reported data. Fetched with Fred's personal API token. Generation resampled 15min->hourly by mean.

value: load-weighted average of ENTSO-E zonal day-ahead prices
source: derived from ENTSO-E zonal prices + zonal load
used_in: IT price series, all IT summaries
note: PROXY. True PUN is published by GME with consumption weights; this approximates it with ENTSO-E actual-load weights across bidding zones. Labelled as proxy throughout.
